channel.title: The Robotics Brief
channel.description: A daily podcast covering the latest in robotics and automation.
channel.itunes:author: Alex
channel.itunes:summary: A daily podcast covering the latest in robotics and automation.

item.title: The Robotics Brief — AI Models
item.description: This week, dive into groundbreaking advancements shaping the future of AI. We explore innovative methods for mitigating perceptual bias in multimodal LLMs and enhancing their continual learning capabilities for video understanding.
item.itunes:summary: This week, dive into groundbreaking advancements shaping the future of AI. We explore innovative methods for mitigating perceptual bias in multimodal LLMs and enhancing their continual learning capabilities for video understanding.
item.itunes:subtitle: This week, dive into groundbreaking advancements shaping the future of AI. We explore innovative methods for mitigating perceptual bias in multimodal LLMs and enhancing their continual learning capabilities for video understanding.

item.title: The Robotics Brief — Learning and
item.description: This week on The Robotics Brief, we explore cutting-edge methods for teaching robots and AI. Dive into how DanceOPD and World Action Models are pushing the boundaries of continual imitation learning through generative replays. Discover new approaches to scalable behavior cloning using open data and how reinforcement learning can enhance LLMs even without ground-truth solutions. Plus, we break down the intricacies of Autoregressive Boltzmann Generators.
item.itunes:summary: This week on The Robotics Brief, we explore cutting-edge methods for teaching robots and AI. Dive into how DanceOPD and World Action Models are pushing the boundaries of continual imitation learning through generative replays. Discover new approaches to scalable behavior cloning using open data and how reinforcement learning can enhance LLMs even without ground-truth solutions. Plus, we break down the intricacies of Autoregressive Boltzmann Generators.
item.itunes:subtitle: This week on The Robotics Brief, we explore cutting-edge methods for teaching robots and AI. Dive into how DanceOPD and World Action Models are pushing the boundaries of continual imitation learning through generative replays. Discover new approaches to s

item.title: The Robotics Brief — AI Robots
item.description: Explore breakthroughs in robotic manipulation, from advanced world models powered by disentangled video generation to systems learning effortlessly from human preferences. We also uncover how human videos can directly train humanoids for zero-shot learning without robot-specific data. Plus, discover how reinforcement learning with metacognitive feedback enhances LLM uncertainty expression, and get insights into the adaptive capabilities of AdaJEPA, a new latent world model.
item.itunes:summary: Explore breakthroughs in robotic manipulation, from advanced world models powered by disentangled video generation to systems learning effortlessly from human preferences. We also uncover how human videos can directly train humanoids for zero-shot learning without robot-specific data. Plus, discover how reinforcement learning with metacognitive feedback enhances LLM uncertainty expression, and get insights into the adaptive capabilities of AdaJEPA, a new latent world model.
item.itunes:subtitle: Explore breakthroughs in robotic manipulation, from advanced world models powered by disentangled video generation to systems learning effortlessly from human preferences. We also uncover how human videos can directly train humanoids for zero-shot learnin

item.title: The Robotics Brief — Robots,
item.description: This week on The Robotics Brief, explore how robots are gaining a more nuanced understanding of their environment with visual-tactile world action models for contact-rich manipulation, alongside portable inference runtimes bringing embodied AI to diverse robotic platforms. Then, delve into creating controllable simulated agents with behavior latents, and discover a new aerial robotic testbed, QuadRocket, pushing the boundaries of adaptive thrust-vector control for rocket-like vehicles. Finally, understand the critical vulnerabilities of distributed attacks in persistent-state AI control systems.
item.itunes:summary: This week on The Robotics Brief, explore how robots are gaining a more nuanced understanding of their environment with visual-tactile world action models for contact-rich manipulation, alongside portable inference runtimes bringing embodied AI to diverse robotic platforms. Then, delve into creating controllable simulated agents with behavior latents, and discover a new aerial robotic testbed, QuadRocket, pushing the boundaries of adaptive thrust-vector control for rocket-like vehicles. Finally, understand the critical vulnerabilities of distributed attacks in persistent-state AI control systems.
item.itunes:subtitle: This week on The Robotics Brief, explore how robots are gaining a more nuanced understanding of their environment with visual-tactile world action models for contact-rich manipulation, alongside portable inference runtimes bringing embodied AI to diverse

item.title: The Robotics Brief — AI Models
item.description: Tune in to explore how AI is gaining a deeper understanding of our world, from OpenCoF's video generation for reasoning to AUTOPILOT VQA benchmarking incident-centric dashcam comprehension.
item.itunes:summary: Tune in to explore how AI is gaining a deeper understanding of our world, from OpenCoF's video generation for reasoning to AUTOPILOT VQA benchmarking incident-centric dashcam comprehension.
item.itunes:subtitle: Tune in to explore how AI is gaining a deeper understanding of our world, from OpenCoF's video generation for reasoning to AUTOPILOT VQA benchmarking incident-centric dashcam comprehension.

item.title: The Robotics Brief — 2026-07-15
item.description: Explore the cutting edge of robotic intelligence, from AI agents that understand task complexity to systems learning to drive without human demonstration through procedural simulations.
item.itunes:summary: Explore the cutting edge of robotic intelligence, from AI agents that understand task complexity to systems learning to drive without human demonstration through procedural simulations.
item.itunes:subtitle: Explore the cutting edge of robotic intelligence, from AI agents that understand task complexity to systems learning to drive without human demonstration through procedural simulations.
